name: core-network
title: AWS Core Network
summary: Creates a VPC with subnets, route tables, an optional internet gateway, optional NAT gateways (single or per-AZ), and optional VPC flow logs delivered to a module-managed CloudWatch log group.

governance.name: prefix
governance.description: Short organization or project prefix. First token of every resource name: {prefix}-{cloud}-{environment}-{resource-type}-{suffix}.

governance.name: environment
governance.description: Deployment environment identifier (e.g., dev, test, prod). Used in resource names and mandatory tags.

governance.name: owner
governance.description: Team or individual that owns the deployed resources. Applied as the mandatory 'owner' tag.

governance.name: cost_center
governance.description: Cost center code for chargeback/showback. Applied as the mandatory 'cost_center' tag.

governance.name: additional_tags
governance.description: Optional additional tags merged beneath the mandatory tag set. Mandatory tags win on key collision.

governance.name: name_suffix
governance.description: Final token of every resource name, used to disambiguate multiple instances of this module (e.g., '01', 'hub').

module.name: region
module.description: AWS region in which to create the VPC and all child resources (e.g., 'us-east-1'). Must match the region of the configured provider.

module.name: vpc_cidr_block
module.description: IPv4 CIDR block for the VPC (e.g., '10.0.0.0/16').

module.name: enable_dns_support
module.description: Whether to enable DNS resolution inside the VPC via the Amazon-provided DNS server.

module.name: enable_dns_hostnames
module.description: Whether instances launched in the VPC receive Amazon-provided DNS hostnames.

module.name: subnets
module.type: map(object({ cidr_block = string availability_zone = string tier = string map_public_ip_on_launch = optional(bool, false) }))
module.description: Map of subnets to create, keyed by a stable logical name (e.g., 'app-a'). tier = "public" attaches the subnet to the public route table (internet gateway default route); tier = "private" attaches it to a private route table (NAT gateway default route when NAT is enabled).

module.name: enable_internet_gateway
module.description: Whether to create an internet gateway and a default route for public-tier subnets.

module.name: enable_nat_gateway
module.description: Whether to create NAT gateway(s) for private-tier subnet egress. Requires at least one public-tier subnet and enable_internet_gateway = true.

module.name: nat_gateway_strategy
module.description: NAT gateway placement: 'single' creates one NAT gateway in the first public subnet; 'per_az' creates one per availability zone that hosts a public subnet (higher cost, AZ-fault isolation).

module.name: enable_flow_logs
module.description: Whether to enable VPC flow logs delivered to a module-managed CloudWatch log group.

module.name: flow_log_retention_days
module.description: Retention period in days for the flow-log CloudWatch log group.

module.name: flow_log_traffic_type
module.description: Traffic type captured by flow logs: ACCEPT, REJECT, or ALL.

outputs.name: network_cidr
outputs.description: IPv4 CIDR block of the VPC.

outputs.name: subnet_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical subnet name to subnet ID.

outputs.name: subnet_cidrs
outputs.description: Map of logical subnet name to subnet CIDR block.

outputs.name: route_table_ids
outputs.description: Map of route table IDs: key 'public' for the shared public table (if any), plus one entry per private subnet keyed by logical subnet name.

outputs.name: internet_gateway_id
outputs.description: ID of the internet gateway, or null when enable_internet_gateway = false.

outputs.name: nat_ids
outputs.description: Map of availability zone to NAT gateway ID. Empty when enable_nat_gateway = false.

outputs.name: nat_public_ips
outputs.description: Map of availability zone to NAT gateway public IP. Empty when enable_nat_gateway = false.

outputs.name: flow_log_id
outputs.description: ID of the VPC flow log, or null when enable_flow_logs = false.
